items.caption: A colorful chart categorizing blood pressure readings into stages of severity. it includes columns for systolic and diastolic pressure readings, with corresponding categories such as "high blood pressure," "pre-high blood pressure," "normal blood pressure," "low blood pressure," and "too low blood pressure." each category is color-coded and has a numerical range associated with it. the chart is designed to provide a visual guide for understanding blood pressure levels and their implications for health.
